name: Precedence Unary Then Carve Postfix
description: -Foo{x->1} — UNARY is below CALL. parse_unary parses .UNARY which doesn't include CALL infixes, so Subtract(nil, Foo) and the Carve never binds inside. UNCERTAIN: parse_unary calls parse_expression(.UNARY) — RANGE/CALL/PRIMARY are higher than UNARY, so they DO attach. Foo{x->1} parses fully as the operand. Therefore Subtract(nil, Carve(Foo,[...])).
